title: Corrected 1M Visitor Milestone Model — Built Backward
methodology: Built backward from 1M/month target. Each month's target is the minimum required to stay on trajectory.
probability_of_1M: 5-15% — requires exceptional execution + indexing breakthrough + at least 1 data asset going viral. Lowered from 10-20% after auditing reveals most pages fail 90/100 gate.

hybrid_realistic_path.assumption: Mix of page tiers with different traffic levels
hybrid_realistic_path.gap_to_1M: 520,000-873,000 visits/month gap — requires significantly more tier 1+2 pages or a viral asset

month_1_jul.goal: Prove quality indexing works. Get first content clicks.
month_1_jul.pages_indexed_target: 10-20 of new pages indexed within 30 days
month_1_jul.data_hub: MVP live with loan + mortgage tables
month_1_jul.key_metric: At least 1 content click. Indexing rate on new pages >= 50%.
month_1_jul.fail_triggers: 0 clicks OR <30% indexing OR doorway/quality issues detected
month_1_jul.scale_trigger: If 5+ clicks + 50%+ indexing + 90+ quality maintained → move to 25 pages/week

month_2_aug.goal: Scale to 500+ approved pages if gates pass. First 100-1,000 clicks.
month_2_aug.data_assets: 3-4 published, at least 1 getting organic traffic
month_2_aug.key_metric: At least 100 clicks. Impressions growing week-over-week.
month_2_aug.fail_triggers: <50 clicks OR <30% indexing OR discovered-not-indexed ratio worsening
month_2_aug.scale_trigger: If 500+ clicks + impressions growing + data asset getting traffic → expand to backup database

month_3_sep.winning_database: Identified and doubled down. Losing databases killed.
month_3_sep.key_metric: 3,000+ clicks. Winning database showing clear growth curve.
month_3_sep.fail_triggers: <1,000 clicks OR no winning database OR quality issues at scale
month_3_sep.scale_trigger: If 10,000+ clicks + winning database growing → expand to held databases

month_4_oct.key_metric: 50,000+ clicks. Data assets getting cited. Domain authority beginning to compound.
month_4_oct.fail_triggers: <15,000 clicks OR no external citations OR indexing rate declining
month_4_oct.scale_trigger: If 75,000+ clicks + citations appearing → move toward 1M trajectory

month_5_nov.critical_checkpoint: MUST be at 100K+ visits by end of Month 5 or 1M is impossible in Month 6
month_5_nov.fail_triggers: <50,000 visits — 1M trajectory DEAD. Extend timeline to 12 months.
month_5_nov.scale_trigger: If 250,000+ visits → 1M in Month 6 is plausible

month_6_dec.goal: 15,000-25,000 approved pages. 1M visits/month ONLY IF all prior months hit.
month_6_dec.1M_possible_if: Month 5 had 150K+ visits AND CTR improved AND domain authority DR 20+ AND winning database dominates niche
month_6_dec.1M_likely_dead_if: Month 5 below 100K visits OR CTR below 1.5% OR no external citations OR indexing issues persist
month_6_dec.honest_assessment: 1M in Month 6 requires a compounding growth curve that starts slow and accelerates. The math works only if: (a) indexing problems resolve, (b) at least 1 database dominates its niche, (c) data assets earn citations building domain authority, (d) CTR optimization succeeds.

failure_triggers_any_month: Indexing rate drops below 25% on new pages
0 content clicks after 60 days of publishing
Google manual action or quality penalty
Build pipeline becomes unstable at scale
Cannibalization detected (money pages lose traffic to database pages)
Quality scores declining (rushing quantity over quality)
scale_triggers_any_month: Indexing rate consistently > 50% on new pages
Impressions growing week-over-week for 4+ consecutive weeks
Winning database clearly identified with growth curve
At least 1 data asset earning natural citations or backlinks
Money pages gaining (not losing) traffic from database support
bottom_line: 1M in 6 months requires everything to go right. Most realistic outcome: 100K-300K visits in 6 months, 1M in 12-18 months. The 6-month goal is a sprint target, not a guarantee.
